title: hieracium murorum subsp. semisilvaticum
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. semisilvaticum, also known as the wall hawk's beard or yellow hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It has been used in herbal medicine for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Hieracium murorum subsp. semisilvaticum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a medicinal treatment.
